prose: TEMPO frontier-orbital analysis via DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell doublet), in PySCF. Geometry: single-point (not relaxed). SCF converged in 12 cycles. HOMO energy = −6.338 eV; LUMO energy = −2.465 eV. HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans orbital energy difference) = 3.872 eV. Also reported: vertical ionization potential 6.338 eV, vertical electron affinity 2.465 eV, chemical hardness 1.936 eV, electronegativity 4.401 eV, electrophilicity index 5.002 eV. TEMPO is a radical with one unpaired electron (multiplicity 2); HOMO is singly occupied. No warnings; integrity trustworthy.
